creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
On Fri, 8 May 2009 22:00:22 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/php5-chartdirector,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134381 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134381
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
Go ahead and make this change.

I noticed that there is now an alternate mirror available. I have
attached a diff, that adds:

http://download.advsofteng.com/

As an alternate mirror  to the port.

Scot
